name: BB:UBA : SSH Session Closed
bb_references: BB:UBA : SSH Session Closed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.SSH Closed, Application.SSH Denied, Application.SSH Terminated, Authentication.SSH Session Finished
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : SSH Session Closed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.SSH Closed, Application.SSH Denied, Application.SSH Terminated, Authentication.SSH Session Finished
